svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Flutter の 3 ツリーモデル: Widget / Element / RenderObject

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 73px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Widget Tree ──build()──▶ Element Tree ──createRenderObject()──▶ RenderObject Tree

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 160px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #6c8ebf;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6c8ebf, #5c79a3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: ① Widget Tree（不変／毎フレーム再生成）

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 460px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #82b366;

div.div: ② Element Tree（可変／フレーム間で保持）

div.div: setState() の動作: 状態が変わると Widget Tree のみ再生成される。Element Tree は同じ位置・型なら同じ Element を再利用するため状態を保持し、変更があった部分だけ RenderObject Tree に反映される。
